system_info.name: Tanzania Wildlife Management Authority (TAWA)
system_info.mission: To conserve and sustainably manage wildlife resources in Game Reserves, Game Controlled Areas, and wildlife corridors through effective partnerships, anti-poaching operations, and community engagement.
system_info.vision: To become a leading institution in the sustainable management of wildlife resources for the benefit of present and future generations of Tanzanians and the global community.
system_info.history: Established in 2014 as an autonomous public institution under the Ministry of Natural Resources and Tourism. It took over the responsibilities of the Wildlife Division regarding the management of wildlife resources outside National Parks and Ngorongoro Conservation Area.

services.name: Tourism Permits
services.detail: Apply through the MNRT Online Portal for all wildlife viewing activities.

services.name: Investment
services.detail: Eco-Lodge development and sustainable partnership opportunities in game reserves.

services.name: Anti-Poaching
services.detail: 24/7 paramilitary surveillance and intelligence operations to protect wildlife.
